description: Identify when certain action happens in the video
example_question_format: When [action name] is performed, describe it in detail.
generation_guideline: Your question should be based on a specific action or event in the video. The query time should be BEFORE the action starts in the video. Ideally, the scene of the action can be roughly imagined from the history BEFORE the query time. The action should be visually distinctive and relevant to the context of the video.

task_qa_example.query: Tell me when the people started to assemble the bed

proposal.positive: a man and a women are holding white boards AND white boards are put together diagonally
A hand is tightening a screw on a white board
A white bed frame stands on the ground, held by two people

proposal.negative: white boards rest on the floor
A man and a women are taking white boards out from a box

task_qa_example.query: tell me when the person starts to fill the toys back.

proposal.positive: A person is putting colorful toys into a container with wood chips

proposal.negative: An empty container with some wood chips

task_qa_example.query: tell me when the person starts to paste the wall mural

proposal.positive: A person holds a black wall mural and pastes it onto a wall
A person pastes a piece of black wall mural onto a wall

proposal.negative: A person is unwrapping a black wall mural from a roll
A person is scraping a wall

task_qa_example.query: tell me when the person starts to weld the metal

proposal.positive: Bright sparks fly from a welding torch
sparks fly between a welding torch and a piece of silver metal

proposal.negative: A person is holding a welding torch near a piece of metal
A person is measuring a piece of metal with a ruler

task_qa_example.query: tell me when the woman takes out the dried flower

proposal.positive: A woman opens a book and takes out a dried flower
A woman opens a paper card and takes out a dried flower

proposal.negative: A woman wraps a book with a string

task_qa_example.query: Tell me when you opens the wardrobe

proposal.positive: An egocentric view showing a person opening a wardrobe door and revealing clothes inside
A person opens a white wardrobe door to show the stuff inside

proposal.negative: An egocentric view showing a person opening a room door
